inputs.name: Writing Task
inputs.default: Write a blog post about the benefits of test-driven development

documentation.overview: This workflow generates high-quality content through iterative self-reflection. The agent creates an initial draft, critiques it, and produces improved versions until quality criteria are met. Perfect for content that requires polish, such as blog posts, marketing copy, and technical documentation.
use_cases: Blog post and article writing with quality assurance
Marketing copy optimization and A/B testing preparation
Email and communication drafting with tone adjustment
prerequisites: OpenAI API key configured as OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable
GPT-4 recommended for better reflection capabilities

example_inputs.task: Write a blog post about the benefits of test-driven development
Create marketing copy for a new SaaS product launch

example_outputs.final_content:
Test-Driven Development: Building Better Software Through Testing First

Test-Driven Development (TDD) is a software development approach that has revolutionized how we write code...

[High-quality, polished blog post content after 3 iterations of refinement]

reflection_history.critique: Initial draft lacks concrete examples and the structure could be improved
Examples are good, but technical accuracy could be enhanced
Strong content, minor engagement improvements needed
